title.en: And that's just part of the plan!

content.en:
After the Lord of the Yuan Gu waited for the Supreme to be ready, he dispersed those Innate Supreme Treasures above the altar and immediately opened the altar.

The only function of this altar is to extract the cosmic origin power contained in the innate treasure, the innate treasure is conceived by the universe, and it contains the power of the universe origin, but the cosmic origin power contained in a single innate treasure is too weak to be detected, and it can only be extracted from the innate treasure in a special way.

And the innate treasures of the twelve cosmic eras, when the universe was destroyed, those cosmic origins were recovered by the cosmic origins, so those innate treasures of the previous cosmic epochs still seem to be innate treasures, but they have lost the cosmic origin, and they are no different from the acquired treasures.

Therefore, the Lord of the Yuan Gu and the others could only collect the innate treasures of this cosmic era.

What they need is not the Innate Treasure itself, but the cosmic origin contained within the Innate Treasure.

And that's just part of the plan!

As time passed, the cosmic origin of the innate treasure was extracted by the altar and fell down one after another, and then the power dropped one after another.

Of course, this reduction in power is only a temporary thing, as long as you pay some price, you can still restore the true power of the Innate Treasure.

Just like the Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower of the Human Race, even if the origin of the Supreme Treasure is asleep, it can still awaken the power of the Supreme Treasure.

Whew!!

One by one, the innate treasures that had lost the origin of the universe were removed by the supreme beings such as the Lord of the Yuan Gu, and the innate treasures on the altar became fewer and fewer.

......

In an area outside the Yuan Gu Palace, one supreme after another slowly emerged, and it was the supreme of the god race, the demon race, and some other cosmic great races.

At this time, all the Supremes were very dignified.

"Not long ago, all the Supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras, as well as the sons of those Eras, and the Supreme Highnesses all gathered in the Yuan Gu Palace, and a very terrifying divine array was arranged in this area, it is obvious that they have made a move, and they don't want to be disturbed by us. I guess they have an amazing plan, and they have to be on guard!"

It was the First Divine Lord who spoke.

"That's right, the Twelve Universe Era's actions are probably not as simple as starting a meeting, otherwise all the people will not gather in the Yuan Gu Palace, and there will be more than a large array to protect this area, I am afraid that they will carry out a plan to threaten all races!"

"Do you want to attack?"

One of the Supremes asked.

"No!" the First Divine Lord shook his head, "There are still too few Supremes who come here, if they are really enemies, we will not be enough to see them, I have already informed the Supremes of all races, let them come as quickly as possible, and wait until there are enough Supremes." Now, let's talk to them first. "

The First Divine Lord said.

"Well, that's all there is to it!"

Other supreme answers.

Immediately, the First Divine Lord used his soul power to transmit his voice into the area of the Yuan Gu Palace.

"Lord of the Ancients, please let us know what you are doing, otherwise we will think that you are doing something that threatens to undermine the security of all races. "The first god said.

One voice after another was transmitted in, and the supremes who guarded the Yuan Gu Hall naturally knew.

Yuangu Palace.

One of the Supremes reported to the Lord of the Yuan Gu and the others: "The Lord of the Yuan Gu, the Supremes, the Supremes of all the races are here, they are snooping outside, and he asked us to show the situation!"

"Are you here? It's normal, after all, they've been spying on us, and they're naturally worried when they know we're together. The Lord of the Yuan Gu sneered: "Don't worry about them, they don't dare to attack for the time being, even if they come to attack, those formations are enough to stop them for some time, so don't care!"

"Yes!"

All supreme ways.

------------

Outside the Yuangu Palace.

The two supreme beings of the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord had gloomy faces, they had already transmitted the message many times, but they had never seen a supreme come out to explain.

Obviously, these Supremes of the Twelve Universe Ages will not manage them anymore.

"It seems that they are really working on a plan that may be working against us. They don't want to explain, or they can't explain it at all, and they may not even be able to leave the Yuangu Palace. Can't wait too long, or it won't be good if they get their plan done!"

The First Demon Lord.

"Wait!" the First Divine Lord gritted his teeth and said, "It's too dangerous to appear now, and when you gather three thousand Supremes, you will take action!"

The Protoss has now come to more than a hundred Supremes, and not all of them have arrived, otherwise there will be a problem, wouldn't the Protoss be in decline, and the Demon Race has only come with more than a hundred Supremes.

In terms of the number of supremes alone, the Protoss and the Demon Race far surpassed the other cosmic races.

And the other universe clans also came with some supremes, but even so, only 500 supremes have gathered now, which is still far from the number of 3,000 supremes.

Time passed little by little, and the number of Supremes increased.

But the universe is too big, and it will take time for them to notify the other universe clans, and then hold a meeting with the other universe clans to let them go, and then rush here.

Therefore, it is not easy to gather 3,000 Supremes.

There are even some ordinary universe clan supremes who are scarce in number and unwilling to take risks, so they really won't necessarily send supremes here.

In the blink of an eye, three days passed.

"2809 Supreme!"

The First Divine Lord muttered.

"Are you still waiting, I have a kind of ominousness, keep waiting, I'm afraid something will happen!"

The First Divine Lord's face changed several times, and he said, "Don't wait, attack the formation of this area!"

"Yes!"

The other supremes said one after another.

At this time, even if some supremes were unwilling to make a move, they had to make a move.

The arrow is on the bow, I have to send it!

Thundered!!!!!

The Supremes struck out with all their might, and one attack after another bombarded the formation outside the Yuan Gu Palace.

But the power of these formations is too terrifying, and even a lot of supreme treasures have been mobilized as the foundation of the formation, and the formations laid out far exceed the formation scope of this cosmic era.

The full force of nearly 3,000 Supremes only destroyed some of the formations on the periphery, but the core formation only trembled a little, and it was completely intact.

"How is it possible, what kind of divine array is this, a blow close to 3,000 supremes, I'm afraid that even a world like the ruins world can be destroyed by us, but the core formation here is fine!"

The First Divine Lord was incredulous.

Immediately, he gave an order: "Continue to attack, take out the Supreme Treasure, and blast through the formation here at all costs!"

The other Supremes did the same, and as Supremes, they all sensed it, as if something big was really going to happen.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

The Supremes kept attacking, and the Yuan Gu Hall was also at a critical moment.
